title: October 27
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}
'''October 27''' is the 300th day of the year (301st in leap years), with 65 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Angus MacInnes]] is born.
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Peter Firth]] is born.
*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[Jan Duursema]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Mat Lucas]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 71|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 71]] published.
*[[1991]] – [[Charlotte Louise]] is born.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 11|''Republic 11: Outlander, Part 5'']] published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars Insider 46|''Star Wars Insider'' 46]] published.
*[[2004]] – [[Republic 70|''Republic'' 70]] published.
*2004 – ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' expansion pack released.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars Chronicles: The Prequels|''Chronicles: The Prequels'']] published.
*2005 – ''[[Star Wars: Where Science Meets Imagination]]'' opens at the Museum of Science in Boston, Massachusetts.
*[[2007]] – [[Star Wars Reunion II|''Star Wars'' Reunion II]] commences in [[Wikipedia:Paris|Paris]], [[Wikipedia:France|France]].
*[[2009]] – ''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – [[Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett 3|''Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett'' 3]] published.
*2010 – [[Invasion: Rescues 5|''Invasion 10: Rescues, Part 5'']] published.
*[[2012]] – "[[Tipping Points]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2014]] – "[[Rise of the Old Masters]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2019]] – "[[Hunt on Celsor 3]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – ''[[The Mandalorian: This is the Way]]'' published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] re-released for the [[Wikipedia:Xbox One|Xbox One]].
*2020 – [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (Screen Comix)|''Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'' Screen Comix]] published.
*[[2021]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 17|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 17]] published.
*2021 – [[War of the Bounty Hunters – IG-88 1|''War of the Bounty Hunters – IG-88'' 1]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic Adventures — The Monster of Temple Peak 3|''The High Republic Adventures — The Monster of Temple Peak'' 3]] published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian: Grogu Annual 2022]]'' published.
<noinclude>
